caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a green t-shirt is seated in a room with framed photos on the wall and a white mannequin in the background. His t-shirt features the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" in a stylized white font. A professional black microphone is positioned in front of him. In the lower corners of the scene, logos for "SIT DOWN" and "RED VELVET" are visible. As the scene progresses, the man shifts his facial expressions; he begins with a wide, open-mouthed smile, then transitions to a slight smirk with pressed lips, and finally settles into a softer, closed-mouth smile. Throughout these changes, his position remains static, and the background elements, including the clothing racks and wall decorations, remain unchanged.
